roy_halee.physical_space: Every element must feel physically placed.
roy_halee.shared_room: Prefer shared spaces over isolated individual effects.
roy_halee.depth: Depth is as important as EQ.
roy_halee.acoustics: Acoustic instruments should retain transient detail and room realism.
roy_halee.width: Width should come from arrangement and placement, not artificial widening.
roy_halee.reverb: Reverb should feel captured, not pasted on.
roy_halee.masking: Controlled blend is acceptable when it creates shared physical space.
roy_halee.arrangement: The arrangement solves more mix problems than processing does.
roy_halee.naturalism: The listener should be able to imagine musicians occupying believable space.
roy_halee.test: Can the listener visualize musicians occupying a real physical space?
